sequence.subject: Quick question about {{company}}'s growth plans
sequence.body:
Hi {{name}},

I noticed {{company}}'s recent {{funding}} round and impressive growth. We're helping companies like yours streamline their operations.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call to explore if we could help?

Best,
Blostem Team

sequence.subject: Following up on {{company}}
sequence.body:
Hi {{name}},

Just wanted to follow up on my previous email. I know you're busy - would a brief intro call work for you?

Feel free to book a time here: [Calendar Link]

Best,
Blostem Team

sequence.subject: One more thought for {{company}}
sequence.body:
Hi {{name}},

I'll keep this brief. Here's a case study of how we helped a similar company in your space achieve 3x ROI:

[Case Study Link]

Would be happy to share more details if interested.

Best,
Blostem Team

sequence.subject: GDPR compliance solution for {{company}}
sequence.body:
Hi {{name}},

With GDPR deadlines approaching, I wanted to reach out about how we helped {{company}}'s peers achieve compliance 40% faster.

Are you available for a quick demo?

Best,
